## TC-001 - Validate RTM coverage for REQ-FR-050

**Objective:** Validate the business, functional, and design traceability captured by RTM row 04eb9e82209befc01ac7c02674789468.
**Priority:** P2
**Suite:** Generated From Derived RTM
**Tags:** kb-generated, rtm-grounded, complete

| Step | RequirementID | StepDescription | ExpectedOutput | TestData |
|------|---------------|-----------------|----------------|----------|
| 1 | REQ-FR-050 | Review RTM row 04eb9e82209befc01ac7c02674789468 and confirm mapped requirements: REQ-SEC-003, REQ-FR-050, REQ-FR-013, REQ-NFR-002. | RTM coverage status is complete with confidence 0.95. | All requirement columns mapped. |
| 2 | REQ-FR-050 | Execute the user-visible workflow or control represented by the mapped requirement chain. | The system behavior matches the cited source requirement. | Use source-approved banking QA test data. |
| 3 | REQ-FR-050 | Capture evidence and reconcile the result back to the RTM row and source requirement chain. | Evidence links back to 04eb9e82209befc01ac7c02674789468 and cited source chunks without unsupported behavior. | Screenshots, logs, exported workbook rows, and audit notes. |
